Initial release: /learn and /recall skills for AI learning feedback loop

Two-skill Claude Code plugin:

- /recall: loads relevant lessons at session start based on detected tech stack

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: iorlas-learn
repository.description: Claude Code plugin: AI learning feedback loop with /learn and /recall skills

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add create task dialog, auto-save, multi-file drop, and comments/data fixes

- Add CreateTaskDialog: when filters are active, Enter opens a dialog instead
  of inserting an inline block, supporting #hashtag and @mention parsing
- Add debounced auto-save (3s default) for inline note title edits
- Support multi-file drag & drop in BlockNoteEditor with parallel uploads,
  and inject delete buttons on file blocks
- Simplify comments UI: remove reply/resolve threading, flatten to a linear
  comment list with compact layout and toast on save
- Make comments fully optimistic: instant UI updates with pending-mutation
  guard to prevent realtime subscription from overwriting local state
- Fix foreign key violations: await note insert in Supabase before emitting
  label/assignee events in createNote and createNoteAfter
- Add optimistic assignee cache updates via event subscription
- Change default note sort from sort_order to created_at descending
- Fix GCal calendar fetch deduplication with one-shot ref
- Add is_default field to Contact type, fix Supabase type casts
- Remove note_comments updated_at DB trigger (managed in app code)
- Add i18n keys for create task dialog and comment saved toast (en/es/pt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Skeld: redo Shields corridor (up 20, right 8, up 8, left 10), start slightly left of center

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: cleanup should delete junk video files like sample.avi

Video/subtitle files identified as junk (samples, extras) are now
deleted during cleanup instead of being preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: proxy MinIO storage through /api/storage for browser access

MinIO runs on internal Docker network, so presigned URLs use hostnames
browsers can't reach. Now getPresignedUrl() returns /api/storage?key=...
proxy URLs instead. Added getFileStream() for streaming files through
the proxy and content-type detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update constraints docs with NF solver, IR/NF, and CEP changes

Sync both technical (constraints.md) and layman (CONSTRAINTS.md) docs
with current codebase: add Snf spacing penalty, no-IR-on-NF-blocks
rule, no-NF-on-Sx/Snf stacking constraint, census-based NF
distribution, cep.md-based research/CEP approvals, updated FSE
negative-response pattern, run penalty multiplier, and section/rotation
mapping tables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Rewrite prompts: learn by doing, no templates or scaffolding

Course creation prompt now explicitly bans setup/scaffolding activities.
The first activity must teach something real. Document structure
emerges from the learner's work, not from prescribed headings.

Activity creation prompt adds "The learner is here to LEARN" section —
never assume existing knowledge. Expanded "Guide, don't dictate" with
explicit NEVER/ALWAYS lists banning templates, prescribed headings,
specific facts to copy, and empty scaffolding. New example shows a
real learn-by-doing first activity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: learn-extension
repository.description: 1111 — An agentic learning app. Chrome side-panel extension by 11:11 Philosopher's Group.

commit.message:
feat: add CustomTkinter GUI and PyInstaller macOS app bundle

- src/itselectric/gui.py: polished dark-mode GUI with config picker,
  scrollable log output, status badge, and run button. Calls itselectric
  modules directly (not subprocess) for reliable bundling. Redirects
  print() output to the log widget in real time via after() thread safety.
- EmailSheets.spec: PyInstaller spec for building Email Sheets.app (onedir
  mode, bundles customtkinter data files and google auth submodules)
- build_app.sh: one-command build script (uv run pyinstaller EmailSheets.spec)
- pyproject.toml: add customtkinter dep, pyinstaller dev dep, itselectric-gui
  entry point
- .gitignore: exclude build/ and dist/ PyInstaller output

Run the GUI:
  uv run itselectric-gui

Build the .app:
  ./build_app.sh
  → dist/Email Sheets.app (drag to /Applications)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: runBin/runBinDebug/teardown refactor (CHK-005, CHK-006, CHK-007) (#267)

* fix: extract _runBinInternal, fix debug env asymmetry, add premature-call guards (CHK-005, CHK-006, CHK-007)

commit.message:
Claude/review codebase status t qflc (#25)

* Fix env variable names in .env.example to match code usage

CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN → LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN
CHANNEL_SECRET → LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY → SUPABASE_KEY

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* Add missing startFirstSceneByPush function

startFirstSceneByPush was called in the join handler but never defined,
causing ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on Render. Added it as a variant of
startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget without user name targeting (used when
no specific parent is known yet at join time).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: create missing src/logic/startFirstSceneByPush.js

handlers/join.js imports startFirstSceneByPush from logic/ but the file
did not exist, causing ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on Render deploy.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: migrate AI calls from OpenAI SDK to Anthropic SDK

- Replace @anthropic-ai/sdk for openai in all AI modules
- Update all openai.chat.completions.create() calls to anthropic.messages.create()
- Change model from gpt-4.1-mini / gpt-4o-mini to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001
- Update response parsing: res.choices[0].message.content → res.content[0].text
- Move system prompt to top-level system param (Anthropic API style)
- Rename exported client from openai to anthropic in client.js

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* chore: add .gitignore to exclude node_modules and .env

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: correct typo generaten -> generateReflection in server.js import

import { generaten } from "./ai/generaten.js" was causing
ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on Render. The correct import is generateReflection
from ./ai/generateReflection.js.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: correct supabase access in startFirstSceneByPush.js

- Replace dynamic import with static import for supabase client
- Fix supabase.supabase.from() -> supabase.from() (double-access bug)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: add mention support for LINE push messages

- Add src/line/pushMention.js: push message with @mention
- Add src/line/pushQuickMention.js: push quick reply with @mention
- Update startFirstSceneByPush to mention first user (A or B)
- Update startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget message text
- Update server.js vision_choice to use pushQuickMention for next user
- Fix: use static supabase import (remove broken dynamic import)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: セッション初期化を await の前に移動してメンション競合状態を修正

memberJoined イベントが replyText の await 中に session.parents.A を
セットしても、handleJoin 再開後に上書きされてしまう競合状態を修正。
session.parents の初期化を await replyText より前に移動することで、
memberJoined が正しく A を登録できるようにした。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: グループメンバーのLINEプロフィール取得をグループ用エンドポイントに変更

/v2/bot/profile/{userId} はフォロー済みユーザー専用のため
グループ内ユーザーで Not Found になっていた。
groupId を渡すことで /v2/bot/group/{groupId}/member/{userId} を使い、
正しい表示名でメンションできるようにした。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: メッセージ処理エラーを修正しフロー全体を堅牢化

- saveMessage のエラーを throw→log に変更（DB保存失敗で会話が止まる問題を修正）
- handleWebhookEvents の catch ブロックで err.message を表示するよう改善
- scene_emotion/value_norm_choice/background_choice/vision_choice の各フェーズで
  Claude API エラー時にフォールバックメッセージを返しフェーズを巻き戻す
- vision_choice の遷移フェーズ名を "n" から "finishing" に変更

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: 「再開」キーワードで直前のbot発言を再送する機能を追加

- 各フェーズ（scene_emotion / value_norm_choice / background_choice / vision_choice）
  でbotが送ったメッセージをsession.lastBotMessageに保存
- ユーザーが「再開」と送ると lastBotMessage をクイックリプライ付きで再送
- saveMessage や turn switch の前に判定するためフロー中断なし

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: sessionsテーブルへのDB永続化を実装

- sessionManager: startSession/endSession を async 化し Supabase sessions テーブルへ insert/update
- saveSession(): フェーズ変化時にセッション状態を DB へ保存
- loadSessionFromDB(): サーバー再起動後に「再開」で DB からセッションを復元
- server.js: 各フェーズ完了後に saveSession を呼び出し、テキスト受信時に loadSessionFromDB でセッション復元を試みる
- startFirstSceneByPush.js: lastBotMessage 設定後に saveSession を呼び出し
- handlers/join.js: startSession を await に変更

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: Step3深掘り機能を実装(最大3ターン)

- src/ai/generateStep3Deep.js を新規作成
  - generateStep3_2Question/Options: エピソード具体化の質問・選択肢生成
  - generateStep3_3Question/Options: 感情を掘る質問・選択肢生成
  - 選択肢は動的生成3つ + 「もう十分思い出した、次に進みたい」固定
- src/server.js を修正
  - generateStep3Deep.js のインポート追加
  - background_choice: Step3-2へ進むか、脱出でStep4へ
  - background_choice_deep2: Step3-3へ進むか、脱出でStep4へ
  - background_choice_deep3: Step4へ進む
  - vision_choice: step3Deepening データをリフレクションに渡す
  - 2人目ターン開始時に step3Deepening をリセット
- src/ai/generateReflection.js を修正
  - backgroundDetail(Step3-2回答)・backgroundEmotion(Step3-3回答)パラメータ追加
  - 深掘り情報がある場合は具体的なエピソードと感情をリフレクションに織り込む

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: Step1選択肢をSupabaseからClaude API動的生成に変更

- src/ai/generateStep1.js を新規作成
  - generateStep1Options: シナリオに対する自然な想い・考えを3つ生成
  - 感情ラベルではなく「自立の一歩だと思う」のような具体的な想い
- src/logic/startFirstSceneByPush.js を修正
  - getStep1Options(Supabase) → generateStep1Options(Claude API)
  - startFirstSceneByPush / startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget 両関数で適用
- src/server.js を修正
  - getStep1Options → generateStep1Options に置換
  - 2人目のターン開始時も新たに生成(B案: 毎回新鮮な選択肢)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* debug: startFirstSceneByPush にメンション失敗原因ログを追加

- session.parents / firstSpeaker / firstUser の状態をログ出力
- firstSpeaker キーでまず親を取得するよう修正（A固定から改善）
- フォールバック時にも原因がわかるログを追加

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: join/memberJoined 競合によるメンション失敗を修正

根本原因:
- join と memberJoined が並行処理され、startSession が
  memberJoined のセット済み parents.A を上書きしていた

修正内容:
- join.js: setTimeoutを削除し、session.pendingStart フラグのみ立てる
- server.js: memberJoined で pendingStart 検出後 currentUserId を確定させ
  3秒後に startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget を呼ぶ
- startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget: pushQuickText → pushQuickMention に変更
  (session.currentUserId/currentUserName を利用)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: join/memberJoined 並行競合によるメンション失敗の根本修正

原因:
- join と memberJoined は別 HTTP リクエストで並行処理される
- memberJoined が parents.A をセット後、join が session.parents を
  {A:null,B:null} で上書きするため parents.A が消える
- かつ memberJoined が pendingStart を確認した時点でまだ false

修正:
1. join.js: session.parents をすでに存在する場合は上書きしない
   (memberJoined が先にセット済みなら保持)
2. server.js: handleJoin 完了後に parents.A がセット済みかチェックし
   pendingStart=true なら即座にシナリオ開始タイマーを起動

これにより join/memberJoined どちらが先でもメンション付き送信が機能する

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: 初回シナリオ開始を startFirstSceneByPush に統一し文言を修正

- startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget は「2人目ターン開始」専用に限定
  (「お待たせしたにゃ。次はあなたの番だにゃ」)
- join/memberJoined の初回シナリオ開始は startFirstSceneByPush を使用
  (「じゃあ、さっそくひとつ聞いてみるにゃ」)
- startFirstSceneByPush のユーザー解決を session.currentUserId/Name 優先に変更
  (server.js で事前セット済みの値を活用、parentsへのフォールバックも保持)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: クイックリプライのlabelを20文字以内に切り捨て

LINE APIの制限: quickReply.items[].action.label は20文字以内
Claude APIが生成する選択肢テキストが超過することがあるため
replyQuick.js と pushQuick.js で substring(0, 20) を適用
(pushQuickMention.js は既に対応済み)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: LIFF ダッシュボード追加（お子さんの生まれ年月設定）

- public/dashboard.html: LIFF 対応のダッシュボード画面を追加
  - お子さんの生まれ年月を選択して保存するフォーム
  - 現在の年齢（○歳○ヶ月）を自動計算して表示
  - グループチャット外から開いた場合はエラー表示
- src/server.js:
  - express.static で public/ を配信
  - GET /api/household?groupId=xxx でグループ設定を取得
  - POST /api/household で upsert 保存
- .env.example: LIFF_ID を追加、OPENAI_API_KEY を ANTHROPIC_API_KEY に修正

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* Add /dashboard route to serve dashboard.html

* Perpetual alternating sessions + LINE datetimepicker for birth month setup

* Add toddler scenarios (18 scenes) with age-based filtering

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: register missing debug loggers and convert error logging to exception logging (#694)

Register 4 new logger categories (queue_manager, queue_processor, archive,
project_manager) in logging_config.py with corresponding CLI flags in main.py.
Add category-specific logger to project_manager.py. Convert logger.error()
to logger.exception() in exception handlers across data_storage.py,
session_coordinator.py, web_server.py, and claude_sdk.py to capture full
tracebacks for diagnostic purposes.

Fixes #618

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remove unsafe migration cleanup that could delete user skills

Previously init deleted non-bo-prefixed skills (review-backend,
meta-task-decomposer, etc.) which could collide with user's own skills.
Now only cleans up bo-log-writer and bo-self-improver (removed in 0.1.5).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pass Soul ID (custom_reference_id) to Higgsfield image generation (#39)

The avatar soulId ('pateit') and product asset were stored in CONFIG
but never passed to API calls. Videos were generated from text prompts
alone with no character reference, producing inconsistent results.

Changes:
- API.higgsfield.generateImage(): auto-switch to /v1/text2image/soul
  endpoint when custom_reference_id is provided, passes it with
  custom_reference_strength for character-consistent generation
- generateSegmentImage/Video(): thread characterId from queue item
  through the pipeline so each segment uses the Soul ID
- runRealPipeline(): pass item.avatar as characterId to all segments
- Add API.higgsfield.listSoulIds() + backend proxy for Soul ID
  discovery and verification on init
- server/index.js: new GET /api/proxy/higgsfield/soul-ids route

commit.message:
Fix retarget: cross-map arms, exclude shoulders/hands, update docs

Arms were doing opposite motion (Mixamo left→Cat left produced swapped
movement due to mirrored rest orientations). Shoulders caused mesh tearing,
hands caused broken wrists. Updated bone mapping to 17 bones with proper
cross-mapping and exclusions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix classify algo validation; default to centroid algorithm

commit.message:
PLAT-429: Fix CI pipeline import errors

Fixed three critical issues causing CI failures:
1. tests/benchmarks/test_protocol_performance.py imported non-existent
   build_command_packet instead of encode_command_packet
2. Multiple tests importing from custom_components failed without
   homeassistant - added @pytest.mark.requires_ha marker
3. .gitea/workflows/ci.yml had Python syntax errors in secrets-scan
   (missing quotes on strings and f-string syntax)

Changes:
- Renamed all build_command_packet → encode_command_packet in test files
- Added 'requires_ha' marker to pyproject.toml
- Marked all HA-dependent test classes/functions with @pytest.mark.requires_ha
- Fixed Python syntax in CI workflow secrets-scan step
- Added missing 'import pytest' to test_ha_const.py

737 core tests now pass successfully (excluding requires_ha marked tests).

commit.message:
restore SerializableClosure signing key after Nutgram runs

Nutgram replaces the SerializableClosure secret key with the bot
token on boot, which means any closures serialized after that point
(like queued job callbacks) are signed with the wrong key. The queue
worker then fails to verify them because it uses the APP_KEY.

Reset the key back to APP_KEY after $bot->run() so queued closures
are signed consistently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(relationships): vNext.3b People View — dependable network layer (#593)

Add People as a first-class operating mode alongside Command Center
in Relationship OS. Two-mode switch at the page level lets users
toggle between the guided strategic surface and a dependable
browse/search/filter/sort people index.

- RelationshipModeSwitch: segmented control (Command Center / People)
- PeopleView: search (debounced, /api/people/search), 5 sort options,
  filter chips (All, Has context, Has company, Tagged, dynamic tags),
  alphabetical letter-grouped list with sticky headers, empty states
- PersonEntry: compact premium person surface with avatar, secondary
  line (drift/context/company priority), stewardship state pill,
  tag pills, graceful sparse-data handling
- Lazy fetch from GET /api/people on first People tab switch, cached
  for session. CC stateMap enrichment bridge via useMemo.
- No new DB tables, no new feature flags, no new API routes

commit.message:
Add device profile document generator v3.13.84

New feature: 'Generate Profile' button on every asset detail page.
Clicking it builds a rich Bootstrap-styled HTML document from the
asset's recorded fields (identity, network, hardware/OS) plus live
data from the linked RMM device if present (agent status, online/offline,
last seen, active alerts). The document is saved to the docs app and
linked back to the asset via Asset.profile_document.

Clicking again regenerates and updates the same document in-place.
A 'View Profile Doc' button appears alongside it once the document exists.

Changes:
- assets/models.py: add profile_document FK → docs.Document
- assets/migrations/0011: migration for profile_document field
- assets/views.py: asset_generate_profile view
- assets/urls.py: route <pk>/generate-profile/
- templates/assets/asset_detail.html: Generate/View Profile buttons

commit.message:
Use ClipboardItem with deferred Promise for reliable clipboard copy

ClipboardItem accepts a Promise<Blob> — this registers the clipboard
write synchronously in the user gesture (preserving activation), while
the compressed URL data resolves asynchronously. Fixes tank URL copy
failing because user activation expired during async compression.

commit.message:
Persist ~/.openclaw on PVC to survive pod restarts

Session store, cron state, and credentials were on the ephemeral
container filesystem. Pod restarts (from skill redeploys, FluxCD
reconciliation, etc.) wiped all sessions, causing agents to lose
conversation context mid-chat.

Symlink ~/.openclaw → /data/openclaw so the persistent volume backs
the entire OpenClaw state directory. The init script still refreshes
skills and config from ConfigMaps on each start, but sessions and
cron state carry over.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: move pipeline state from JSON files to PostgreSQL (#82)

Pipeline state was stored in JSON files on disk (pipeline.json) while
events and queue lived in PostgreSQL, causing desyncs between the two
systems. The merge-stage bug (#435/#437 stuck at agent-merge) was a
symptom — queue said completed but pipeline.json still said blocked.

- Add `pipelines` table (migration V2) with all PipelineState fields
- Rewrite pipeline.Store to use DB for state, keep disk for artifacts
  (prompts, session logs, outcomes, check output)
- Update all CLI commands and orchestrator to pass *db.DB to Store
- Store.Update() now uses DB transactions instead of file read-modify-write
- Store.List() uses indexed SQL queries instead of filesystem walks
- Store.Get() is a single query instead of legacy-vs-namespaced path walking

Co-authored-by: lucas <lucas@MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[무한 로딩 수정]

[분석 피드백 직관성 개선 - Spotlight Compare]
- '일반형' 등 단순 라벨 대신 구체적 설명 표시
  예) '일반형' → '클릭을 끌어당기는 뚜렷한 구조가 없어요'
- 인기 영상과 비교 시 비율 수치 포함한 맥락 제공
  예) '인기 영상 68%가 숫자·리스트형인데, 내 영상은 일반형이에요'
- 개선 팁(→) 추가: 일반형일 때 구체적 조치 방법 안내
- 제목 길이 피드백에 임계값별 맥락 추가 (10자 초과 시 압축 권고)
- match/mismatch 시각 구분 (녹색 체크 / 액센트 팁)

[불필요 파일 제거 - 레거시 바닐라 JS/HTML]
- 삭제: auth/dashboard/spotlight/timing/mypage/payment/pricing .html
- 삭제: dashboard/spotlight/timing.js, utils.js, supabase-config.js
- 삭제: theme-init.js(루트), style.css(루트), firebase-debug.log

commit.message:
Add encoding.xml as GitOps-managed ConfigMap for Jellyfin

Moves NVENC transcoding config from NFS PVC to a ConfigMap so it
survives NFS corruption and is version controlled. Mounted as a
subPath overlay at /config/config/encoding.xml.

Key settings: NVENC hwaccel, CUVID decoder (lower VRAM), throttling
enabled, HDR tonemapping with bt2390, HEVC encoding allowed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add PATCH endpoint for writing client changes to Notion
- Editable expanded rows: status, programs, todos, all fields
- Debounced Notion sync with visual indicators
- Dismissable client alerts with 7-day localStorage expiry
- Click-to-edit health metric counts on home screen
- Staleness indicator reflects most recent edit date

commit.message:
security: harden API headers, fix OAuth redirect_uri, add upload size limit

- Add security headers middleware (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options,
  X-XSS-Protection, HSTS, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
- Restrict CORS allow_headers from wildcard to Authorization + Content-Type
- Fix hardcoded api.metricshour.com in OAuth redirect_uri — now uses settings.api_url
- Add API_URL to config.py (env-driven, defaults to https://api.metricshour.com)
- Add 5 MB file size limit on blog cover image upload (prevents DoS via R2)
- Remove @nuxtjs/tailwindcss (Vite 6 incompatible) — add tailwindcss + autoprefixer directly
- Add ogImage + twitterImage to indices/[symbol].vue (was the only page missing OG image)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: AI 크로스 도구 룰 파일 추가 (RULES.md + CLAUDE.md + .cursorrules)

RULES.md를 공유 원본으로, CLAUDE.md(Claude Code)와 .cursorrules(Cursor)가
동일한 규칙을 참조하도록 구성. PR 템플릿에 동기화 체크리스트 추가.

commit.message:
v5.3: Direction invert, calibration fix, web UI overhaul, bulk WebSocket output

- Add direction invert via TMC2209 shaft register (command + HA switch + NVS)
- Expand stall sensitivity levels: extra_low(5), low(15), medium(30), high(60), max(100)
- Fix calibration position tracking: back-off from close wall now sets position 0
  correctly instead of offset by 50, eliminating close boundary shortfall
- Redesign setup page: dark theme with cyan-purple gradient matching Assistant
  Listeners, SVG curtain icon, dropdown selects for microsteps and sensitivity
- Add root `/` redirect to `/setup`, Console button links to WebSerial
- Add `ws_send_bulk()` for instant WebSocket output on help/status/config
  (bypasses setBuffer line-by-line flushing)
- Add `#define FW_VERSION` for single-source version tracking
- Convert microsteps and stall threshold from text inputs to dropdowns on setup page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
